titles.title: Yamakoshi Mura no Mari to Sanbiki no Koinu

山古志村のマリと三匹の子犬

data.title: Yamakoshi Mura no Mari to Sanbiki no Koinu
data.title_japanese: 山古志村のマリと三匹の子犬
title_synonyms: Yamakoshi-mura no Mari to Sanbiki no Koinu
Yamakoshi Mura no Mari to San-biki no Koinu
data.synopsis:
Based on a picture book written about the 2004 earthquake in Chuuetsu, Niigata prefecture.

Mari's three puppies were just born, when the earthquake in Yamakoshimura started. Now their home is in ruins, and their owner, an old man is trapped under the debris. Mari somehow manages to break her chain, and encourages the old man, until help arrives. In the end, someone saves the old man, but he can't take in the dogs, so they remain in the now abandoned village. Can Mari and the puppies live on like this? 

(Source: AniDB)

titles.title: 未来からのメッセージ

data.title: Mirai Kara no Message
data.title_japanese: 未来からのメッセージ
data.synopsis: An educational film about adoption discrimination in Japan. How those who are adopted are seen as rejects of society and the public koseki allows for companies to see the family tree of applicants and not hire/fire employees based on the fact that they're adopted.

data.title: Niji no Kakehashi
data.title_japanese: 虹のかけ橋
data.synopsis: Satoshi is a popular boy thanks to his success in soccer. Kaori becomes jealous and spreads rumors that Satoshi was of low class birth. The school begins to shun Satoshi to the point that he stops playing soccer. When Kaori's house is damaged by a landslide Satoshi comes to help.

titles.title: 負けるな！千太～さよならいじめ虫～

data.title: Makeruna! Senta: Sayonara Ijime Mushi
data.title_japanese: 負けるな！千太～さよならいじめ虫～
data.synopsis: Human beings as well as other creatures have a cruel heart. Everyone thinks that all they're doing is bullying insects. In this anime each individual is confronted with the bullying and asked about it; their replies show the ugliness of their own hearts.
